name: bug-fix-kit
description: Local Codex plugin for repeatable bug reproduction, diagnosis, and fix sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Run local bug reproduction and fix loops from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bug Fix Kit helps Codex turn a reported bug into a repeatable local session with project knowledge, issue runners, per-iteration evidence, diagnosis reports, and fix records.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Bug Fix Kit for this local service.
Create a bfk issue for this failing request.
Run bfk and diagnose the latest iteration.
